title: No subscriptions. Just credits.
subtitle: Credits unlock books in the iRoly app. Buy more when you want — they never expire. A typical book is 60 credits, ~¥9.9.
alacarte: Or buy a book à la carte.
alacarteSubtitle: Every book is ¥9.9. Mix & match — your credits balance carries over.

faq.a: Never. Spend them when you feel like coloring.

faq.q: Can I use credits on print pages too?
faq.a: Yes — credits unlock the full book in the app, and you can print any page from there.
No. iRoly has never had subscriptions. Buy what you want, when you want.

faq.q: Will my books sync between devices?
faq.a: Yes, with a free iRoly account. Library plans and above include cloud backup of your art.

faq.q: What if I don't love a book?
faq.a: Refunds within 7 days, no questions. We'll return the credits to your wallet.
In beta. Email us at hello@iroly.studio.
